company.name: WaterbearIntl
company.address_en: 15F, Block B, International Business Center, Yinzhou District, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China
company.address_zh: 中国浙江省宁波市鄞州区国际商务中心B座15层

hero.desc_en: Premium industrial product exports to 50+ countries. One-stop supply chain solutions from sourcing to delivery.
hero.desc_zh: 专注高品质工业产品出口，服务全球50+国家与地区，提供从采购到交付的一站式供应链解决方案。

about.text1_en: Founded in 2008 and headquartered in China's manufacturing heartland, WaterbearIntl is a professional industrial products export company.
about.text1_zh: WaterbearIntl成立于2008年，总部位于中国制造业核心区域，是一家专业的工业产品出口贸易公司。
about.text2_en: With over 5,000 sqm of warehouse facilities and 200+ premium suppliers, annual exports exceed $200M.
about.text2_zh: 公司拥有超过5000平方米的仓储设施，与国内外200多家优质供应商建立了长期战略合作关系，年出口额突破2亿美元。

advantages.desc_en: Strict ISO 9001 quality management, multiple inspections per batch to meet international standards
advantages.desc_zh: 严格遵循ISO 9001质量管理体系，每批次产品均经过多重检测，确保符合国际标准

advantages.desc_en: Factory-direct supply chain eliminates middlemen, delivering competitive prices without compromising quality
advantages.desc_zh: 自有工厂直供，减少中间环节，在保证品质的前提下提供最具竞争力的价格

advantages.desc_en: Modern logistics system partnered with top international carriers ensures on-time global delivery
advantages.desc_zh: 现代化仓储物流体系，与多家国际物流巨头合作，确保准时交付全球各地

advantages.desc_en: 24/7 multilingual customer support, one-on-one service from selection to after-sales
advantages.desc_zh: 提供7×24小时多语言客服，从选型、下单到售后全程一对一专业跟进

cta.desc_en: For product inquiries, technical consultation, or business collaboration
cta.desc_zh: 如需产品询价、技术咨询或业务合作

footer.brand_desc_en: Professional industrial products export company, delivering premium Chinese-manufactured products and one-stop procurement solutions worldwide.
footer.brand_desc_zh: 专业工业产品出口公司，为全球客户提供优质中国制造产品和一站式采购解决方案。
